local e={}
e.__index=e
function e.Init()
e.indexData={}
e.indexData['index_1']={}
e.indexData['index_1']['0']={100010,100020,100030,100040,100050,100060,200010,200020,200030,200040,200050,200060,300010,300020,300030,300040,300050,300060,400010,400020,400030,400040,400050,400060,100110,100120,100130,100140,100150,100160,200110,200120,200130,200140,200150,200160,300110,300120,300130,300140,300150,300160,400110,400120,400130,400140,400150,400160,500110,500120,500130,500140,500150,500160,100210,100220,100230,100240,100250,100260,200210,200220,200230,200240,200250,200260,300210,300220,300230,300240,300250,300260,400210,400220,400230,400240,400250,400260,500210,500220,500230,500240,500250,500260,100310,100320,100330,100340,100350,100360,200310,200320,200330,200340,200350,200360,300310,300320,300330,300340,300350,300360,400310,400320,400330,400340,400350,400360,500310,500320,500330,500340,500350,500360,100410,100420,100430,100440,100450,100460,200410,200420,200430,200440,200450,200460,300410,300420,300430,300440,300450,300460,400410,400420,400430,400440,400450,400460,500410,500420,500430,500440,500450,500460,100610,100620,100630,100640,100650,100660,200610,200620,200630,200640,200650,200660,300610,300620,300630,300640,300650,300660,400610,400620,400630,400640,400650,400660,500610,500620,500630,500640,500650,500660,100710,100720,100730,100740,100750,100760,200710,200720,200730,200740,200750,200760,300710,300720,300730,300740,300750,300760,400710,400720,400730,400740,400750,400760,500710,500720,500730,500740,500750,500760,100810,100820,100830,100840,100850,100860,200810,200820,200830,200840,200850,200860,300810,300820,300830,300840,300850,300860,400810,400820,400830,400840,400850,400860,500810,500820,500830,500840,500850,500860,100910,100920,100930,100940,100950,100960,200910,200920,200930,200940,200950,200960,300910,300920,300930,300940,300950,300960,400910,400920,400930,400940,400950,400960,500910,500920,500930,500940,500950,500960,101010,101020,101030,101040,101050,101060,201010,201020,201030,201040,201050,201060,301010,301020,301030,301040,301050,3010 e.indexData['index_1']['31121']={631121,641121,651121,661121,671121}
e.indexData['index_1']['31122']={631122,641122,651122,661122,671122}
e.indexData['index_1']['31123']={631123,641123,651123,661123,671123}
end
function e.GetByIndex(t,a)
if e.indexData[t]and e.indexData[t][a]then
return e.indexData[t][a]
else
return{}
end
end
return e
